Name: Average time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment across all process variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the end of the case

Name: Total time spent in Queued + Awaiting Assignment before transitioning to Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Minimum time required to complete Queued + Awaiting Assignment when followed by Accepted + Wait - User
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Average duration of Queued + Awaiting Assignment in variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Total time from the start of a case to the completion of Queued + Awaiting Assignment
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the end of the case

Name: Average time between the end of Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the start of Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Minimum time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment in variants that directly lead to Completed + Resolved without intermediate wait states
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Average time spent in Queued + Awaiting Assignment when it appears multiple times within the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the end of the case

Name: Total duration of Queued + Awaiting Assignment in variants where Completed + In Call occurs after at least one wait state
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Average time from the first occurrence of Queued + Awaiting Assignment to the execution of Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Minimum time between consecutive occurrences of Queued + Awaiting Assignment within the same case
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'

Name: Average time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment grouped by country
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case grouped by the last value of organization country

Name: Total time spent in Queued + Awaiting Assignment before any activity involving user waiting (e.g., Accepted + Wait - User)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Average duration of Queued + Awaiting Assignment in variants that do not contain Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call does not occur

Name: Time elapsed from the completion of Queued + Awaiting Assignment to the start of the next Queued + Awaiting Assignment in recurring patterns
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'

Name: Average time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment when followed directly by Accepted + Assigned
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Assigned'

Name: Total time from case start until the last occurrence of Queued + Awaiting Assignment in multi-occurrence variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment in variants ending with Completed + Closed without any Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Average time between the end of Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the start of Accepted + Wait - Implementation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation'

Name: Time from the completion of Queued + Awaiting Assignment to the execution of Completed + In Call in variants where both activities occur
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'
